title: The White Eagle
writer: Leonid Andreyev, Oleg Leonidov, Yakov Protazanov
actors: Vasili Kachalov, Vsevolod Meyerhold, Andrey Petrovsky
plot: "Not to spare bullets!" was the highest command to a governor in case of a workers' revolt. Desperate time - desperate measures. No participant can find rest after the event.
